channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large fly tip including washing machines, mattress, builders rubble, and broken glass, 29th June
item.description:
Path blocked by mound of fly tipped refuse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A38, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor Reinstatement Of Road Surface, 29th June
item.description:
Poor reinstatement of the road surface following works for the new Harper Crewe housing development in Stoke Orchard. A trench was dug across the width of the main stoke road near the new development entrance, when reinstated the new tarmac is above the surface of the existing road resulting in the reinstatement forming a speed bump which could damage cars after the council have just resurfaced this road to restore it back to good condition. The unintended speed bump is particularly bad in the direction of Stoke Orchard to Bishop’s Cleeve.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 29th June
item.description:
Faded Road Markings Please Repaint 20 x Single Dots 4-Way Stop & Go (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 29th June
item.description:
Faded Road Markings Please Repaint 15 x Single Dots 14 x Double Dots 1 x Centre Lines 1 x Triangle 4-Way Stop & Go (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 29th June
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference over aco pipe 800x100x20 mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 29th June
item.description:
give and take 28 days please lift and replace broken rocking dropped kerb stone x1 . 900x100x40mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 29th June
item.description:
